title: Abbott India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Abbott India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Abbott India has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Chennai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Abbott India:
Abbott India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Abbott India!
